reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine the birth dates for Ronnie Radke and Dave Brockie.
2. Compare the two birth dates and return the person born first.
original_final_question: Who was born first, Ronnie Radke or Dave Brockie? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Ronnie Radke was born on December 15, 1983, while Dave Brockie was born on August 30, 1963, so Dave Brockie was born first. -> Dave Brockie
